name: pareto-principle
description: Evaluations for pareto-principle skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user needs to identify vital few inputs that drive majority of outcomes

prompts.input: 用帕累托原则分析哪 20% 的工作产生了 80% 的价值
Apply the 80/20 rule to identify which features to focus on for max impact
这些任务清单太长了，怎么找出最关键的 20% 来优先处理？
prompts.reason: Chinese context: long list + identify vital few

prompts.input: Which are the vital few inputs that drive most customer satisfaction?
二八法则：哪些关键少数的因素决定了大部分的结果？
prompts.reason: Chinese triggers: '二八法则' + '关键少数' (vital few)

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for tasks requiring exhaustive analysis or time-based classification

prompts.input: I need to ensure every item on this safety checklist is completed
prompts.reason: Compliance/safety requires all items, not 80/20 optimization

prompts.input: Separate these tasks into urgent vs important categories
prompts.reason: Time-based classification should trigger eisenhower-matrix, not pareto-principle

prompts.input: We need a complete list of all possible risks with no items omitted
prompts.reason: Exhaustive analysis contradicts pareto focus; should use inversion or systems-thinking
